retrieved_result: Proper Dance Attire I do ask that students wear proper clothing while participating in classes. To give proper dance instruction, I need to be able to see body alignment. Below is a listing of expected attire for classes. *Preschool, Intro to Dance, Ballet, Dance Combo 1 & 2 – Any color Leotard (need black for shows),
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result is about proper dance attire for classes, not about easy DIY room decoration ideas.
